post.description:
Authenticates a user with tenant code, username/email, and password.
    
**Possible Responses:**
- **Success**: Returns access token and user info
- **TOTP Required**: If 2FA is enabled, returns session token for TOTP verification  
- **Password Reset Required**: If password expired or force reset flag is set

The refresh token is automatically set as an HTTP-only cookie.

200.description:
Password reset required

TOTP verification required

Login successful - returns access token

401.description: Invalid credentials

403.description: Account locked or tenant disabled

error.message: Account is locked due to too many failed attempts

post.description:
Exchanges a valid refresh token for a new access token.
    
The refresh token can be provided in:
1. Request body (refreshToken field)
2. HTTP-only cookie (refresh_token)

Refresh tokens are single-use and rotate on each refresh.

401.description: Invalid or expired refresh token

error.message: Refresh token is invalid or expired

post.description:
Invalidates the current refresh token and clears the session.
    
This only logs out the current device. Use /logout-all to logout all devices.

401.description: Not authenticated

get.description: Implicit URL-token issuance is disabled. Use password login or SSO exchange to create a TCRN session.

401.description: Current password incorrect

note.description: Operator note recorded in the capability assignment audit

next.description: Safe internal path to continue after SSO login

result.description: One-time opaque result code returned by the SSO callback

result.description: One-time opaque result code returned by the SSO account-link callback

code.description: SSO provider code scoped to the current tenant/AC owner

providerType.description: SSO provider type. Mock providers are reserved for isolated test runtime fixtures.

clientSecretRef.description: Secret reference. Only env:NAME references are accepted; raw secrets are forbidden.

redirectUri.description: Provider callback URI registered with the IdP

claimMappingPolicy.description: Non-authoritative claim mapping policy. It cannot grant TCRN RBAC.

status.description: Readiness status. Blocked means human deeplinks must fail closed.

requiredByPhase.description: Phase or rollout that requires this readiness item

providerId.description: SSO provider id that satisfies the readiness item

failClosed.description: Whether tool human entrypoints must fail closed until SSO is ready

rememberMe.description: Remember me flag for extended session (30 days)

sessionToken.description: Temporary session token returned from login when TOTP is required
Session token returned from login when password reset is required

newPassword.description: New password (min 12 chars, must include uppercase, lowercase, number, special char)

refreshToken.description: Refresh token (optional if using HTTP-only cookie)

code.description: 6-digit TOTP code from authenticator app to verify setup

secure.description: Whether the SMTP transport uses TLS/SSL
